request.system:
你是一个用于 PDF 原位回填的精修助手。
你处理的是已经翻译过、但版面过紧的文本块。
你的目标不是重写内容，而是在尽量不损失信息和正式风格的前提下，做最小必要压缩。
只返回 JSON，不要输出任何解释。

文档场景：上市公司年度报告翻译与逐页版面回填
目标风格：正式、审慎、可披露、接近已发布英文年报

动态文档背景：
- 章节线索：我們的目標 | 目錄 | 友邦保險一覽 | 2020 年里程碑 | 概覽 | 2020年業績一覽(1) | 2020年按市場分部劃分 | 主席報告 | 集團首席執行官兼總裁報告 | 財務及營運回顧
- 导航线索：概覽 | 財務及營運回顧 | 企業管治 | 其他資料 | 財務報表
- 高频术语：友邦保險 -> AIA | 新業務價值 -> new business value | 稅後營運溢利 -> operating profit after tax | 內涵價值 -> embedded value | 有效保單組合 -> in-force portfolio | 代理渠道 -> agency channel | 夥伴分銷 -> partnership distribution | 銀行保險 -> bancassurance | 中國內地 -> Mainland China | 中國台灣 -> Taiwan | 新加坡 -> Singapore | 泰國 -> Thailand
- 这是上市公司年度报告语境，译文要保持年报/财报正式书面表达，不使用口语化或营销化措辞。
- 文档包含财务表格、比率和金额，数字、百分比、币种、年份及缩写必须严格保留。
- 文档包含目录或侧边导航，导航项宜使用固定、稳定、可复用的正式译法。
- 文档存在大量章节标题，标题应优先贴近正式已发布年报的写法，并尽量避免不必要换行。
- 公司历史语料：AIA Group
- 历史固定标题参考（只复用译法语义，不强制大小写和换行）：財務及營運回顧 -> Financial and Operating Review
- 优先沿用该公司历史年报中已经稳定出现的栏目标题、导航名和管理层头衔译法。
- 若当前页面与历史年报中的页面形态接近，应优先参考该公司惯用的标题长度、表格标签写法和正式披露语气。
- 若历史英文标题采用全大写或特殊分行展示，仅借鉴其正式措辞，不强制沿用大小写和换行样式。
- 历史近似页面：
-   2022 p24 [showcase_narrative] 集團首席財務總監回顧
-   2023 p28 [showcase_narrative] 集團首席財務總監回顧
-   2022 p23 [section_lead] 財務及營運回顧

受保护信息：
- 数字
- 百分比
- 货币
- 年份
- 日期
- 专有名词
- 公司名
- 人名
- 地名
- 图表微标签
- 页码

硬约束：
- 只做最小幅度缩短，不要摘要化，不要改成分析师速记风格。
- 不要随意缩写正式标题、栏目名、导航项、图表标签、页眉页脚。
- 如果原文是完整句，优先保持完整句。
- block_id 必须原样保留。
- 返回格式：{"translations": [{"block_id": "...", "translation": "..."}]}

    {

      "current_translation": "After-tax value of unallocated\ngroup head office expenses\n(161)\nNot meaningful\nNot meaningful\n(154)\nNot meaningful\nNot meaningful\nNot meaningful\nNot meaningful",

      "current_translation": "Non-controlling interests\n(24)\nNot meaningful\nNot meaningful\n(32)\nNot meaningful\nNot meaningful\nNot meaningful\nNot meaningful",

      "line_count": 9,

      "source_text": "儘管2020年的新業務價值27.65億美元較2019年減少了33%，我們迅速採用了新的數碼工具，並且外出限制的普",
      "current_translation": "Although new business value of US$2,765 million in 2020 decreased by 33% compared with 2019, we rapidly adopted new digital tools and the widespread relaxation of movement restrictions supported a recovery in sales momentum. AIA's China business contributed the largest share to the Group's new business value in 2020 and was the first",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.444,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 56,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        432.05,
        527.25,
        444.0
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p20_b22",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "遍放寬支持了銷售勢頭的恢復。友邦保險中國業務為2020年本集團的新業務價值帶來最大貢獻，也是我們第一個",
      "current_translation": "reporting segment to show a recovery in sales momentum, as the region progressively relaxed strict lockdowns from March 2020 onwards. Excluding new business sales from Mainland China visitors to Hong Kong, which remained at low levels, the Group's other segments showed strong recovery in new business value in the second half, growing 23% compared with the first half. The Group's new business",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.444,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 51,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        448.05,
        527.24,
        460.0
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p20_b23",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "顯示銷售勢頭有所恢復的報告分部，原因在於該地區自2020年3月逐步放寬嚴格的封鎖。撇除維持低位的中國內",
      "current_translation": "development momentum remained strong in 2021, with new business value in the first two months 15% higher than the corresponding period in 2020. AIA's China business recorded successful momentum in 2021, with new business value in the first two months showing very strong growth compared with the corresponding period in 2020. New business value of US$968 million in 2020 decreased by 17% compared with 2019, primarily due to limited sales in the initial outbreak of COVID-19 in the first quarter. As movement restrictions were relaxed, new business momentum improved rapidly. New business value resumed our customary seasonal pattern, with a greater proportion in the first",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "overflow",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.444,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 51,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        464.05,
        527.25,
        476.0
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p20_b24",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "地訪港旅客銷售額，本集團其他分部的新業務價值在下半年強勁復甦，與上半年相比增長了23%。本集團的新業",
      "current_translation": "half. In 2020, AIA's China business contributed the largest share to the Group's new business value. Following the implementation of travel restrictions, new business sales from Mainland China visitors to Hong Kong in AIA's Hong Kong business were effectively suspended from early February 2020, resulting in a significant decline in new business value. The new business value profit margin recorded a decline, reflecting the impact of underwriting expense overruns due to reduced new business volume, changes in product mix and",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.444,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 50,
      "bbox": [

        480.05,
        527.23,
        492.01
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p20_b25",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "務發展勢頭在2021年持續強勁，首兩個月新業務價值較2020年同期高出15%。",
      "current_translation": "lower interest rates. Macau resumed the individual travel scheme for Mainland China visitors from late September 2020. This provided support for the recovery of new business sales from Mainland China visitors to Macau, which accounted for more than one-third of AIA Macau's total annualized new premiums in the fourth quarter.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.444,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 39,
      "bbox": [

        387.96,
        508.01

      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p20_b26",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "友邦保險中國業務在2021年錄得成功的勢頭，首兩個月的新業務價值與2020年同期比較，錄得非常強勁的增",
      "current_translation": "Although new business value of US$2,765 million in 2020 decreased by 33% compared with 2019, we rapidly adopted new digital tools and the widespread relaxation of movement restrictions supported a recovery in sales momentum. AIA's China business contributed the largest share to the Group's new business value in 2020 and was the first reporting segment to show a recovery in sales momentum, as the region progressively relaxed strict lockdowns from March 2020 onwards.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.444,

    },
    {

      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "長。2020年新業務價值9.68億美元較2019年減少17%，主要由於2019冠狀病毒病在第一季爆發初期而導致銷售額",
      "current_translation": "Excluding new business sales from Mainland China visitors to Hong Kong, which remained at low levels, the Group's other segments showed strong recovery in new business value in the second half, growing 23% compared with the first half. The Group's new business development momentum remained strong in 2021, with new business value in the first two months 15% higher than the corresponding period in 2020.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.444,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 58,
      "bbox": [

        544.06,
        527.19,
        556.01
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p20_b28",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "有限。隨著外出限制放寬，新業務動力得以迅速改善。新業務價值重拾我們慣常的季節性規律，比重更側重於上",
      "current_translation": "AIA's China business recorded successful momentum in 2021, with new business value in the first two months showing very strong growth compared with the corresponding period in 2020. New business value of US$968 million in 2020 decreased by 17% compared with 2019, primarily due to limited sales in the initial outbreak of COVID-19 in the first quarter. As movement restrictions were relaxed, new business momentum improved rapidly.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.444,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 49,
      "bbox": [

        560.06,
        527.08,
        572.02
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {

      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "半年。在2020年，友邦保險中國業務為集團的新業務價值帶來最大貢獻。",
      "current_translation": "New business value resumed our customary seasonal pattern, with a greater proportion in the first half. In 2020, AIA's China business contributed the largest share to the Group's new business value.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.456,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 34,
      "bbox": [

        369.63,
        588.02
      ],

    },
    {

      "source_text": "在實施旅遊限制後，友邦保險香港業務來自中國內地訪港客戶的新業務銷售自2020年2月初起實際上已暫停，導",
      "current_translation": "Following the implementation of travel restrictions, new business sales from Mainland China visitors to Hong Kong in AIA's Hong Kong business were effectively suspended from early February 2020, resulting in a significant decline in new business value. The new business value profit margin recorded a decline, reflecting the impact of underwriting expense overruns due to reduced new business volume, changes in product mix and",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.444,
      "line_count": 1,
      "char_count": 51,
      "bbox": [
        73.7,
        608.07,
        527.25,
        620.02
      ],
      "font_size_avg": 9.0,
      "suggested_font": "F_ARIALN"
    },
    {
      "block_id": "p20_b31",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "致其新業務價值大幅下降。新業務價值利潤率錄得跌幅，反映新業務量減少導致承保開支超支、產品組合變動及",
      "current_translation": "lower interest rates. Macau resumed the individual travel scheme for Mainland China visitors from late September 2020. This provided support for the recovery of new business sales from Mainland China visitors to Macau, which accounted for more than one-third of AIA Macau's total annualized new premiums in the fourth quarter.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.444,
      "line_count": 1,

        636.02
      ],

    },
    {
      "block_id": "p20_b32",
      "block_type": "body",
      "source_text": "利率下降的影響所致。澳門在2020年9月底恢復中國內地旅客個人遊計劃。這為澳門的中國內地訪澳客戶銷售回",
      "current_translation": "Following the implementation of travel restrictions, new business sales from Mainland China visitors to Hong Kong in AIA's Hong Kong business were effectively suspended from early February 2020, resulting in a significant decline in new business value. The new business value profit margin recorded a decline, reflecting the impact of underwriting expense overruns due to reduced new business volume, changes in product mix and lower interest rates.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
      "fit_status": "font_shrink",
      "current_font_ratio": 0.444,

    },
    {

      "source_text": "升提供支持，使其在第四季佔友邦保險澳門分公司的年化新保費總額超過三分之一。",
      "current_translation": "Macau resumed the individual travel scheme for Mainland China visitors from late September 2020. This provided support for the recovery of new business sales from Mainland China visitors to Macau, which accounted for more than one-third of AIA Macau's total annualized new premiums in the fourth quarter.",
      "translation_source": "model_initial",
